stemHtml: An aeroplane enroute to the oceanic entry point BEGAS receives an Oceanic Clearance to enter via point BERUX. The pilot of the aeroplane must…

options.a: Request and obtain a re-clearance from ATC to fly to BERUX
options.b: Fly to BEGAS, and when reaching BEGAS fly on to BERUX
options.c: Turn towards BERUX 5 minutes before reaching BEGAS
options.d: Programme the FMS to fly direct to BERUX from the waypoint BEGAS
